nodes.name: Classifier Webhook (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Body: { lead_id }. Calls Claude Haiku to classify a single lead into one of: reply | hot_lead | no_show_rebook | upcoming_call | follow_up | skip. Used for ad-hoc re-classification when a lead's state changes mid-day; the morning generator already classifies in bulk via compute_daily_tasks.
